description:
You are a Loss Prevention Manager at Meridian Industrial Supply. Reconcile the physical cycle count for the following 6 SKUs in the WH/Stock location against the Odoo system inventory. Create and validate an inventory adjustment for any products where the physical count differs from the system records.

Physical Count Results:
- 3M Peltor OX2000 Safety Glasses (SKU: INV-AUDIT-001): 45 units
- Milwaukee 2606-20 M18 Drill Driver (SKU: INV-AUDIT-002): 12 units
- Stanley 33-725 FatMax 25ft Tape (SKU: INV-AUDIT-003): 18 units
- Honeywell FAK10-012 First Aid Kit (SKU: INV-AUDIT-004): 0 units
- 3M 8210 N95 Respirator 20-Pack (SKU: INV-AUDIT-005): 50 units
- Klein Tools 32500 11-in-1 Screwdriver (SKU: INV-AUDIT-006): 7 units
